items.title: Arsenal v Sunderland, Wolves v Chelsea, Burnley v West Ham and more: football – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League and EFL updates from the 3pm GMT kick-offs ⚽ Live scores | Tables | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Emillia Full-time: Manchester United 2-0 Tottenham Carrick earns his fourth successive win as United’s interim head coach. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Summerville voor vijfde duel op rij trefzeker voor West Ham
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-wedstrijden op het programma, maar ook in het buitenland wordt gevoetbald. Onder meer Manchester United Arsenal, Barcelona, Borussia Dortmund en Napoli komen in actie. Volg al het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Man Utd beat 10-man Spurs for 4th straight win
items.summary: Manchester United's revival under Michael Carrick rolled on against Tottenham with goals from Bryan Mbeumo and Bruno Fernandes piling more misery on Thomas Frank's Spurs.

items.title: USMNT to compete for 1 of 6 spots at 2030 WC
items.summary: Concacaf says it will have six automatic qualifying spots in the 2030 World Cup and a seventh will be available as part of an intercontinental playoff.

items.title: Barcelona confirm withdrawal from Super League
items.summary: Barcelona have announced their official withdrawal from the European Super League in the latest blow to a project which has struggled to get off the ground.

items.title: Unsafe, rain-affected pitch postpones LaLiga game
items.summary: Saturday's LaLiga game between Rayo Vallecano and Real Oviedo has been postponed with concerns over player safety due to the state of the pitch.

items.title: Arteta apologises to Rosenior after 'disrespect'
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has apologised to Chelsea after Liam Rosenior accused the north London side of a "lack of respect" during the warm-ups before Tuesday's Carabao Cup semifinal, second leg.

items.title: Sterspeler Yildiz verlengt contract bij Juventus
items.summary: In de buitenlandse topcompetities is Deadline Day voorbij, maar in enkele landen kunnen nog deals gesloten worden. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International de buitenlandse markt op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Championship roundup: Davis sinks Derby to boost Ipswich’s promotion charge
items.summary: Derby captain Travis scores own goal and sees red Southampton extend Watford’s woeful run Leif Davis’s superb late header gave Ipswich a 2-1 victory at Derby to strengthen their promotion challenge. The visitors took the lead in the eighth minute when the Derby captain, Lewis Travis, headed a corner into his own net but Derby hit back in the second half and drew level through Rhian Brewster’s penalty. But Davis had the final word and the home side ended the match with 10 men after Travis’s miserable afternoon ended with him sent off in added time for a second yellow card. Continue reading...

items.title: Haiti Couleurs 7/1 for Gold Cup after easy Denman Chase success
items.summary: Haiti Couleurs made all the running to win the William Hill Denman Chase at Newbury and set up a potential tilt at the Gold Cup in the process.

items.title: Davis earns Ipswich victory at Derby
items.summary: A glorious Leif Davis header earns a precious win over Derby County and moves Ipswich Town up to third in the Championship.

items.title: Fernandes keeps Carrick’s perfect Manchester United record intact after Romero red card
items.summary: Michael Carrick’s Manchester United revival has a fourth consecutive league win, while Thomas Frank’s Tottenham sink further, with still no victory in the competition in 2026. Bruno Fernandes’s 81st-minute strike was a feathered touch off a shin – from Diogo Dalot’s cross – that beat Guglielmo Vicario to the left of the Spurs goalkeeper, and confirmed a miserable day for Frank. Continue reading...

items.title: Slagvaardig Man Utd boekt tegen Spurs vierde competitieoverwinning op rij
items.summary: Manchester United heeft zaterdagmiddag de vierde overwinning op rij geboekt in de Premier League. Na zeges op Manchester City, Arsenal en Fulham werd ook gewonnen van Tottenham Hotspur. De club staat nu vierde op de ranglijst.

items.title: Final Score
items.summary: Jason Mohammad and guests bring you all the goals, analysis, reaction and interviews.

items.title: Fortuna denkt aan Marsman
items.summary: Nick Marsman (35) is in beeld als noodverband onder de lat bij Fortuna Sittard. De Limburgers kunnen de oud-doelman van FC Twente, Go Ahead Eagles, FC Utrecht, Feyenoord, ADO Den Haag en Roda JC buiten de transferwindow aantrekken vanwege zijn clubloze status.

items.title: Reed two clear at Qatar Masters in pursuit of second title in three weeks
items.summary: Patrick Reed will take a two-shot lead into the final round of the Qatar Masters as he targets a second DP World Tour title in three weeks.

items.title: Man Utd beat Spurs as Romero sees red and pressure mounts on Frank
items.summary: Michael Carrick made it four wins from four as Manchester United landed a confident 2-0 victory over toothless Tottenham, with the visitors' misery compounded by Cristian Romero's second sending off of the season.

items.title: Larin beleeft na vertrek bij Feyenoord droomdebuut voor Southampton
items.summary: Cyle Larin is zaterdag bij zijn debuut voor Southampton direct beslissend geweest in het Championship. De Canadese spits deed als invaller wat hem de eerste seizoenshelft bij Feyenoord maar een keer lukte: scoren.

items.title: Barcelona withdraw from European Super League project
items.summary: Barcelona withdraw from the European Super League project, leaving rivals Real Madrid as the only one of the original 12 clubs still signed up to the plans.

items.title: Havertz block after Raya error keeps Arsenal level vs Sunderland LIVE!
